name: Global Eletronic Solutions LTD.
notes:
GES BG is a company which delivers services in the Information Technologies field. Using the services from GES BG our partners can rely on a team of professionals with over ten years experience in the full range of IT services. Having our specialists manage and support your IT infrastructure You can ensure your companyâ€™s effective and cost efficient IT work processes which in our days are the backbone of every business. So our services target the business which want to focus on their main activities and leave the IT support of their infrastructure in the hands of our highly qualified and experienced team.

I. Hardware and IT infrastructure:
   - Design of IT infrastructure
   - Setup and configuration of IT equipment (servers, network components, etc)
   - Server Virtualization (VMware, KVM, OpenVZ, Jails)
   - Implementation of SAN (Storage Area Network) solutions based on Fiber Channel, iSCSI, and other technologies.
   - Resource distribution and creation of clusters for High Availability (HA) and High Performance.
   - Setup and support of your own or leased :
    1. Databases - MySQL, PostgreSQL, MS SQL, Oracle
    2. Web servers - Apache, Nginx, IIS, Tomcat
    3. Mail transfer agents (MTA) - Exim, Sendmail, Qmail, Postfix, MS Exchange
    4. File servers - FTP, MS Sharepoint, Samba, WebDAV
    5. Hosting servers using CPanel , Plesk and so on.
    6. Video and audio streaming servers.
    7. Windows Active Directory implementation and integration
    8. Clean installation and setup of operating systems - MS Windows, FreeBSD, Linux (Redhat, CentOS, Debian, Ubuntu and so on).
    9. Internet based phone services (VoIP, SIP) and IP PBX
    10. Management and monitoring of IT infrastructure
    11. Data backup strategies and data recovery
    12. Professional advice and consulting about your new hardware or software
    13. Operating systems and server software updates
    14. Design, implementation and integration of individual solutions according to the clientâ€™s requirements

II. Network design:
   - Network topology design (physical and logical connectivity)
   - Load distribution of the network traffic (Network Load Balancing)
   - Setup and support of routers (Juniper, Cisco etc.), switches (Juniper, Cisco, HP, Extreme etc.) and firewalls (Juniper SRX, Cisco ASA etc.) and firmware updates
   - Implementing and supporting of virtual private networks (VPN)
   - Building wireless networks (WiFi, HotSpot)

III. Proactive services:
  - Monitoring and analyzing (network and processing load and so on) of IT equipment.
  - Performance monitoring of the fundamental IT infrastructure
  - E-mail and SMS notifications if there are problems with your network equipment or services
  - Monthly availability reports
